description: Add homepage URL to the Vercel plugin to enable the side panel 'open tab' feature.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/vercel && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Vercel plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://vercel.com/dashboard' to both the Vercel plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: VercelPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://vercel.com/dashboard' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/vercel/src/index.ts (add homepage property to VercelPlugin class)
- plugins/vercel/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The VercelPlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class VercelPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'vercel';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Vercel';
  override readonly displayName = 'Vercel';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://vercel.com/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://vercel.com/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://vercel.com/dashboard';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://vercel.com/dashboard"
```

Constraints:
- Use `https://vercel.com/dashboard` (the dashboard), NOT just `https://vercel.com` (marketing page).
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
